description.content: Operations for managing CRM lists
Returns a page of all CRM lists in the portal. Lists can be either static (manually managed membership) or dynamic (filter-based membership). Use the limit and after parameters to paginate results.

query.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.
The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.
The object type ID to filter lists by (e.g., 0-1 for contacts).
Filter by list type - STATIC or DYNAMIC.

response.name: Successful response with a list of CRM lists.

Creates a new CRM list. You can create either a static list with manually managed membership or a dynamic list with filter-based membership that updates automatically as records match the criteria.

Operations for managing list memberships
Returns the records that are members of a specific CRM list. For static lists, returns manually added members. For dynamic lists, returns records that currently match the list filters.

query.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.
The cursor for pagination to get the next page of results.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the list.

item.name: Hubspot Add Members to a List

request.name: Hubspot Add Members to a List

description.content: Adds records to a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. Records added will remain members until explicitly removed.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the static list to add members to.

item.name: Hubspot Remove Members From a List

request.name: Hubspot Remove Members From a List

description.content: Removes records from a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. The records themselves will not be deleted, only removed from the list.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the static list to remove members from.

The Lists API allows you to create and manage lists of CRM records based on static membership or dynamic filter criteria. Lists can be used to segment contacts, companies, and other CRM objects for marketing and sales operations.
